families.evidence_signal: rubric row, pass/warn/fail criteria, negative control
source annotations, transfer architecture, method limits, current anchor metadata
families.failure_signal: evidence contract implies unsupported empirical proof

families.evidence_signal: synthesis, agent boundary, policy lane, owner, residual-risk and refresh duty
families.failure_signal: governance boundary becomes assurance without authority

families.evidence_signal: render, reference, PDF, figure, and report gates
families.failure_signal: method claim survives without fresh artifact evidence

families.evidence_signal: chapter primer, scope caveat, source-family support
families.failure_signal: orientation guidance reads as measured performance

families.evidence_signal: unit profile, chapter roster, bounded reuse language
topic-specific lessons, safe example, source spines, safe substitutions
families.failure_signal: practice studio prose becomes generic or operational
